name: Fettucine with Lemon and Vodka Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil; add the kosher salt and cook the pasta at a rapid boil until "al dente," 8-10 minutes.
2. Drain the pasta. Grate the rind of one lemon, then squeeze the juice out and reserve.
3. Combine the cream and vodka in a 10-inch skillet. Simmer for 5 minutes, or until the sauce thickens slightly.
4. Add the lemon juice and rind to the hot sauce and cook for 1 minute, stirring.
5. Add the drained pasta to the sauce and toss. Season with pepper, garnish with parsley, and serve immediately on warmed plates. Serve parmesan separately.
6. Variation: Add cooked scallops and/or cooked asparagus cut into 1-inch pieces to the sauce just before tossing with pasta. Garnish with slices of the second lemon.
